jsonLd.title: NSE is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at NSE are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
